title: Setúbal, Lisboa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Setúbal, Lisboa: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Setúbal is a city in Lisboa with a population of 121,185. A port city on the Sado River, famous for its seafood, historic old town, and the nearby Arrábida Natural Park.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
